declaration-no-important.message: Avoid !important - use specificity or Material component variants instead

max-nesting-depth.message: Nesting too deep - consider refactoring or using Material components

comment-word-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated and breaks encapsulation. Target Material classes directly or use CSS variables.

selector-pseudo-element-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated. Use CSS custom properties (--md-sys-color-*) or target Material classes directly.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Use MD3 4px grid spacing (4px, 8px, 12px, 16px, 20px, 24px, etc.). For dynamic values, use calc() with design tokens.

color-no-hex.message: Use MD3 design tokens (--md-sys-color-*) instead of hex colors for theme support.

function-disallowed-list.message: Use MD3 design tokens (--md-sys-color-*) instead of color functions for theme support.

selector-pseudo-class-disallowed-list.message: ::ng-deep is deprecated. Use CSS custom properties or target Material classes directly.

property-disallowed-list.message: The 'clip' property is deprecated. Use 'clip-path' instead.

declaration-block-no-duplicate-propertie.message: Duplicate property found. Remove the duplicate.

font-family-no-missing-generic-family-ke.message: Add a generic font family fallback (e.g., sans-serif)
